name: Chicken with Shallots and Sundried Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup to 1 cup Heavy cream (skim milk works, but curdles at first and has to cook down to become smooth)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken breast diagonally into 1-inch strips.
2. Melt butter and oil in a heavy skillet on moderate heat.
3. Increase the heat, add chicken, half of the herbs, salt, and pepper. Sauté until opaque; set aside and keep warm.
4. Add shallots and garlic to the pan and saut quickly (about ½ minute).
5. Reduce heat, then add cream, wine, tomatoes, and the remaining herbs.
6. Bring to a boil and stir until the sauce thickens.
7. Return chicken to the pan and simmer 2-3 minutes until heated through.
